title: eryngium strotheri
intro: Eryngium strotheri, also known as Strother's eryngo, is a perennial plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to the southeastern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Eryngium strotheri include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. Eryngium strotheri can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for use in traditional medicine, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
